description_long: This is a medium-sized red apple with a natural, slightly irregular shape and a short brown stem protruding from the top. The apple's skin is predominantly a deep red with some yellow-green speckling, especially visible on one side. A single green leaf is attached near the stem, adding a touch of freshness. One side of the apple has a large, clearly defined bite mark, exposing the pale yellow, moist flesh beneath the skin. The surface of the apple is mostly smooth with a subtle matte finish, and the bite mark reveals a slightly rougher, fibrous texture. There are no visible stickers, labels, or significant blemishes on the skin.
description: A red apple with a bite taken out, featuring a green leaf and a brown stem.
description_view_0: Red apple with stem and leaf visible, no bite mark shown.
description_view_1: Front view showing a large bite taken out, exposing yellow flesh.
description_view_2: Side view with green leaf and some yellow-green speckling on the red skin.
description_view_3: Back view of the apple, showing smooth red skin and the stem with leaf.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: large bite taken out, no other damage
